About Kele

Kele Heart is a web developer based in the city of San Diego, CA. ☀️

As a full-stack web developer with a passion for creating beautiful, functional, and user-friendly websites. He is currently working as a web developer for Innovision Marketing Group, works freelance oppourtunities, and is currently working to develop his own fintech company with a partner.

Also a self taught developer who has been coding for over 7 years, he has a passion for learning and is always looking for new oppourtunities to grow and learn. He is currently working on learning Ruby on Rails to pursue the development of his fintech company.

This site serves as a portfolio of work, and a place for him to share his thoughts and ideas. Please feel free to read the blog if you’re a developer yourself, or if you’re interested in learning more about the world of web development.
